executives.name: David Cates
executives.background: Mr. Cates is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Denison and serves on the Board of Directors. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) and holds a Master of Accounting (MAcc) and a Bachelor of Arts (BA) degree from the University of Waterloo. Prior to his appointment as President and CEO, he served as Denison's Vice President Finance and Chief Financial Officer.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Executive Officer (2015–Present); Director (2018–Present); previously Vice President, Finance & Tax and Chief Financial Officer (2008–2015)

executives.name: Ron Hochstein
executives.background: Mr. Hochstein is the Chair of the Board. He is currently the President and CEO of Lundin Gold Inc. and has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Board Chair (Current), Director (Current), Former President and CEO
